questions.stem_en: A Class C driver license allows you to drive a 2-axle vehicle with a GVWR of how many pounds or less?
questions.stem_zhHant: C類駕照允許您駕駛總重量不超過多少磅的兩軸車輛？
questions.explanation_en: A Class C license allows you to drive a 2-axle vehicle with a GVWR of 26,000 lbs or less, including towing a trailer of 10,000 lbs GVWR or less.
questions.explanation_zhHant: C類駕照允許駕駛總重量不超過26,000磅的兩軸車輛，包括拖掛重量不超過10,000磅的拖車。
questions.explanation_zh: C类驾照允许驾驶总重量不超过26,000磅的两轴车辆，包括拖挂重量不超过10,000磅的拖车。

questions.stem_en: Which license class is required to operate a two-wheel motorcycle?
questions.stem_zhHant: 駕駛兩輪摩托車需要哪種類別的駕照？
questions.explanation_en: A Class M1 license is required to operate a two-wheel motorcycle or motor-driven cycle. Class M2 is for motorized bicycles and mopeds.
questions.explanation_zhHant: M1類駕照用於駕駛兩輪摩托車。M2類駕照用於駕駛機動自行車和助力車。
questions.explanation_zh: M1类驾照用于驾驶两轮摩托车。M2类驾照用于驾驶机动自行车和助力车。

questions.stem_en: If you hold a valid Class A license, which of the following vehicles can you legally drive?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果您持有有效的A類駕照，您可以合法駕駛以下哪種車輛？

options.text_en: Only vehicles requiring a Class A license
options.text_zhHant: 僅限需要A類駕照的車輛

options.text_en: Vehicles covered by Class A, B, and C licenses
options.text_zhHant: A類、B類和C類駕照允許的所有車輛

options.text_en: Vehicles covered by Class A and M1 licenses
options.text_zhHant: A類和M1類駕照允許的車輛

questions.explanation_en: Higher class licenses include the privileges of lower classes. A Class A license holder can drive vehicles covered by Class A, B, and C licenses.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 高級別駕照包含低級別駕照的駕駛權限。持有A類駕照可以駕駛A類、B類和C類駕照允許的所有車輛。
questions.explanation_zh: 高级别驾照包含低级别驾照的驾驶权限。持有A类驾照可以驾驶A类、B类和C类驾照允许的所有车辆。

questions.stem_en: A Class M2 license is required to operate which type of vehicle?
questions.stem_zhHant: M2類駕照用於駕駛哪種類型的車輛？
questions.explanation_en: A Class M2 license is for motorized bicycles, mopeds, or any bicycle with an attached motor.
questions.explanation_zhHant: M2類駕照用於駕駛機動自行車、助力車或任何裝有馬達的自行車。
questions.explanation_zh: M2类驾照用于驾驶机动自行车、助力车或任何装有马达的自行车。

questions.stem_en: A commercial Class B license is required to operate:
questions.stem_zhHant: 商業B類駕照用於駕駛：

options.text_en: A combination of vehicles over 26,001 lbs with a towed vehicle over 10,000 lbs
options.text_zhHant: 總重量超過26,001磅且被拖車輛超過10,000磅的組合車輛

options.text_en: A single vehicle with a GVWR of 26,001 lbs or more, or a bus
options.text_zhHant: 總重量超過26,001磅的單一車輛或公交車

questions.explanation_en: A commercial Class B license is required for a single vehicle with a GVWR of 26,001 lbs or more, or any bus (except a trailer bus).
questions.explanation_zhHant: 商業B類駕照用於駕駛總重量超過26,001磅的單一車輛或公交車（拖車公交車除外）。
questions.explanation_zh: 商业B类驾照用于驾驶总重量超过26,001磅的单一车辆或公交车（拖车公交车除外）。

questions.stem_en: To apply for an original California driver license, which of the following is required?
questions.stem_zhHant: 首次申請加州駕照，以下哪項是必須的？

options.text_en: Apply online without visiting a DMV office
options.text_zhHant: 在網上申請，無需前往DMV辦公室

options.text_en: Visit a DMV office and complete a DL 44 application form
options.text_zhHant: 親自前往DMV辦公室並填寫DL 44申請表

options.text_en: Have a relative submit the application on your behalf
Mail in the application with a photo

questions.explanation_en: To apply for an original California driver license, you must visit a DMV office in person and complete a DL 44 application form.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 首次申請加州駕照需要親自前往DMV辦公室，填寫DL 44申請表。
questions.explanation_zh: 首次申请加州驾照需要亲自前往DMV办公室，填写DL 44申请表。

questions.stem_en: How many questions are on the Class C knowledge test, and what score is needed to pass?
questions.stem_zhHant: C類駕照筆試有多少道題，需要多少分才能通過？
questions.explanation_en: The Class C knowledge test has 36 questions. You must answer at least 30 correctly (83%) to pass.
questions.explanation_zhHant: C類駕照筆試共36道題，需答對至少30題（正確率83%）才能通過。
questions.explanation_zh: C类驾照笔试共36道题，需答对至少30题（正确率83%）才能通过。

questions.stem_en: How long is your instruction permit valid after your application is accepted?
questions.stem_zhHant: 學習許可證自申請被接受之日起有效期為多長？
questions.explanation_en: Your instruction permit is valid for 12 months from the date your application is accepted. If you do not get your license within 12 months, you must reapply.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 學習許可證自申請被接受之日起有效期為12個月。如果12個月內沒有拿到駕照，則需要重新申請。
questions.explanation_zh: 学习许可证自申请被接受之日起有效期为12个月。如果12个月内没有拿到驾照，则需要重新申请。

questions.stem_en: If you fail the driving test, how long must you wait before retaking it?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果路考不合格，需要等待多長時間才能重考？
questions.explanation_en: If you fail the driving test, you must wait at least 14 days before retaking it. You have 3 attempts within the 12-month period.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 路考不合格需等待至少14天才能重考。12個月內共有3次路考機會。
questions.explanation_zh: 路考不合格需等待至少14天才能重考。12个月内共有3次路考机会。

questions.stem_en: Which tests must you pass to receive a California driver license?
questions.stem_zhHant: 要獲得加州駕照，必須通過哪些考試？

options.text_en: A vision exam and a knowledge test only
A vision exam, a knowledge test, and a behind-the-wheel driving test
A physical exam and a driving test only

questions.explanation_en: You must pass a vision exam, a knowledge test (written or computer-based), and a behind-the-wheel driving test to receive your license.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 申請駕照需要通過視力檢查、交規筆試（紙質或電腦考試）和路考三項測試。
questions.explanation_zh: 申请驾照需要通过视力检查、交规笔试（纸质或电脑考试）和路考三项测试。

questions.stem_en: A REAL ID compliant driver license requires how many proofs of California residency?
questions.stem_zhHant: 申請符合REAL ID標準的駕照需要幾份加州居住證明？
questions.explanation_en: A REAL ID compliant driver license requires proof of identity, proof of Social Security Number, and two proofs of California residency.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 申請符合REAL ID標準的駕照需要身份證明、社會安全號碼證明以及兩份加州居住證明。
questions.explanation_zh: 申请符合REAL ID标准的驾照需要身份证明、社会安全号码证明以及两份加州居住证明。

questions.stem_en: How many attempts do you have to pass the knowledge test within the 12-month application period?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在12個月的申請有效期內，您有幾次筆試機會？
questions.explanation_en: You have 3 attempts to pass the knowledge test within the 12-month application period.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在12個月的申請有效期內有3次考試機會。
questions.explanation_zh: 在12个月的申请有效期内有3次考试机会。

questions.stem_en: How long must a minor hold a provisional instruction permit before taking the driving test?
questions.stem_zhHant: 未成年人必須持有臨時學習許可證多長時間才能參加路考？
questions.explanation_en: Minors under 18 must hold a provisional instruction permit for at least 6 months before taking the driving test.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未滿18歲的申請人必須持有臨時學習許可證至少6個月後才能參加路考。
questions.explanation_zh: 未满18岁的申请人必须持有临时学习许可证至少6个月后才能参加路考。

questions.stem_en: How many hours of supervised driving practice must a minor complete before taking the driving test?
questions.stem_zhHant: 未成年人在參加路考前必須完成多少小時的有監督駕駛練習？
questions.explanation_en: A minor must complete at least 50 hours of supervised driving practice, including at least 10 hours of night driving.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年人在參加路考前必須完成至少50小時的有監督駕駛練習，其中至少10小時為夜間駕駛。
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年人在参加路考前必须完成至少50小时的有监督驾驶练习，其中至少10小时为夜间驾驶。

questions.stem_en: During the first 12 months after licensing, a minor may NOT drive between which hours?
questions.stem_zhHant: 未成年人拿到駕照後的前12個月內，不得在哪個時間段駕車？
questions.explanation_en: During the first 12 months, a minor may not drive between 11 PM and 5 AM unless accompanied by a licensed parent/guardian or a licensed driver 25 or older.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年人拿到駕照後的前12個月內，不得在晚11點至凌晨5點之間駕車，除非有持照的父母/監護人或25歲以上的持照駕駛員陪同。
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年人拿到驾照后的前12个月内，不得在晚11点至凌晨5点之间驾车，除非有持照的父母/监护人或25岁以上的持照驾驶员陪同。

questions.stem_en: What is the minimum age to apply for an instruction permit in California?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在加州申請學習許可證的最低年齡是多少？
questions.explanation_en: Minors must be at least 15 years and 6 months old to apply for an instruction permit, and must have completed driver education.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年人必須年滿15歲半才能申請學習許可證，且必須已完成駕駛教育課程。
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年人必须年满15岁半才能申请学习许可证，且必须已完成驾驶教育课程。

questions.stem_en: A 17-year-old with a provisional license is driving at night. Which situation is legal?
questions.stem_zhHant: 一名17歲持有臨時駕照的司機在夜間駕車。以下哪種情況是合法的？

options.text_en: Driving with a 19-year-old friend at 11:30 PM
options.text_zhHant: 晚上11:30與一位19歲的朋友一起駕車

options.text_en: Driving with a licensed parent at 1 AM
options.text_zhHant: 凌晨1點與持照父母一起駕車

options.text_en: Driving with a 22-year-old sibling at midnight
options.text_zhHant: 午夜與一位22歲的兄弟姐妹一起駕車

questions.explanation_en: A minor may drive between 11 PM and 5 AM only when accompanied by a licensed parent/guardian or a licensed driver 25 or older.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年人只有在持照父母/監護人或25歲以上的持照駕駛員陪同下，才可以在晚11點至凌晨5點之間駕車。
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年人只有在持照父母/监护人或25岁以上的持照驾驶员陪同下，才可以在晚11点至凌晨5点之间驾车。

questions.stem_en: How many questions are on the minor knowledge test?
questions.stem_zhHant: 未成年人筆試共有多少道題？
questions.explanation_en: The minor knowledge test has 46 questions. You must answer at least 38 correctly to pass.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 未成年人筆試共46道題，需答對至少38題才能通過。
questions.explanation_zh: 未成年人笔试共46道题，需答对至少38题才能通过。

questions.stem_en: How long is a standard California driver license valid?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州標準駕照的有效期是多長？
questions.explanation_en: A standard California driver license is valid for 5 years.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州標準駕照有效期為5年。
questions.explanation_zh: 加州标准驾照有效期为5年。

questions.stem_en: At what age must drivers renew their license in person at a DMV office?
questions.stem_zhHant: 多大年齡的駕駛員必須親自到DMV辦公室辦理續期？
questions.explanation_en: Drivers 70 years of age and older must renew their license in person at a DMV office and cannot renew by mail or online.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 70歲及以上的駕駛員必須親自到DMV辦公室辦理續期，不能通過郵寄或網上續期。
questions.explanation_zh: 70岁及以上的驾驶员必须亲自到DMV办公室办理续期，不能通过邮寄或网上续期。

questions.stem_en: How many days do you have to notify the DMV after a change of address?
questions.stem_zhHant: 地址變更後必須在多少天內通知DMV？
questions.explanation_en: You must notify the DMV within 10 days of any change of address.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 地址變更後必須在10天內通知DMV。
questions.explanation_zh: 地址变更后必须在10天内通知DMV。

questions.stem_en: If your license has been expired for more than one year, what must you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果您的駕照過期超過一年，您必須怎麼做？

options.text_en: Renew online with a late fee
options.text_zhHant: 在網上繳納滯納金續期

options.text_en: Apply for a new license and retake all tests
options.text_zhHant: 重新申請駕照並重新參加所有考試

options.text_en: Visit DMV to get an extension

questions.explanation_en: If your license has been expired for more than one year, you cannot renew it. You must apply for a new license and retake all tests.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果駕照過期超過一年，則無法續期，必須重新申請駕照並重新參加所有考試。
questions.explanation_zh: 如果驾照过期超过一年，则无法续期，必须重新申请驾照并重新参加所有考试。

questions.stem_en: Approximately how many days before your license expires will you receive a renewal notice?
questions.stem_zhHant: 駕照到期前大約多少天會收到續期通知？
questions.explanation_en: You will receive a renewal notice about 60 days before your license expires.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 駕照到期前約60天會收到續期通知。
questions.explanation_zh: 驾照到期前约60天会收到续期通知。

questions.stem_en: What happens to your license if you refuse to take a chemical test when lawfully requested by an officer for a first offense?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果初犯時在執法人員合法要求下拒絕接受化學測試，您的駕照會怎樣？
questions.explanation_en: If you refuse a chemical test when lawfully requested, your license will be suspended for 1 year for a first offense under California's Implied Consent law.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 根據加州的「默示同意法」，如果在執法人員合法要求下拒絕接受化學測試，初犯將被暫停駕照1年。
questions.explanation_zh: 根据加州的“默示同意法”，如果在执法人员合法要求下拒绝接受化学测试，初犯将被暂停驾照1年。

questions.stem_en: Under the Negligent Operator Treatment System (NOTS), accumulating how many points in 12 months results in a license suspension?
questions.stem_zhHant: 根據過失駕駛員處理系統（NOTS），12個月內累計多少分將導致駕照暫停？
questions.explanation_en: Accumulating 4 points in 12 months, 6 in 24 months, or 8 in 36 months results in a suspension.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 12個月內累計4分、24個月內6分或36個月內8分將導致駕照暫停。
questions.explanation_zh: 12个月内累计4分、24个月内6分或36个月内8分将导致驾照暂停。

questions.stem_en: A DUI conviction counts as how many points on your driving record?
questions.stem_zhHant: 酒駕定罪在駕駛記錄上記幾分？
questions.explanation_en: Major violations such as DUI, hit-and-run, or reckless driving count as 2 points. Most other traffic convictions count as 1 point.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 酒駕、肇事逃逸、魯莽駕駛等嚴重違規記2分。大多數其他交通違規記1分。
questions.explanation_zh: 酒驾、肇事逃逸、鲁莽驾驶等严重违规记2分。大多数其他交通违规记1分。

questions.stem_en: Your driving privilege will be suspended if you are involved in a collision and did not have:
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果發生事故時您沒有以下哪項，駕駛權將被暫停？

options.text_zhHant: 適當的保險或財務擔保

questions.explanation_en: Your driving privilege will be suspended if you are involved in a collision and did not have proper insurance or financial responsibility.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果發生事故時沒有購買適當保險或不具備財務擔保能力，駕駛權將被暫停。
questions.explanation_zh: 如果发生事故时没有购买适当保险或不具备财务担保能力，驾驶权将被暂停。

questions.stem_en: Which of the following will result in your license being revoked?
questions.stem_zhHant: 以下哪項將導致您的駕照被吊銷？

options.text_zhHant: 肇事逃逸造成人員傷亡

questions.explanation_en: Your license will be revoked if you are convicted of a DUI or a hit-and-run resulting in injury.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 因酒駕或肇事逃逸造成人員傷亡被定罪的，駕照將被吊銷。
questions.explanation_zh: 因酒驾或肇事逃逸造成人员伤亡被定罪的，驾照将被吊销。

questions.stem_en: In California, which law enforcement officers can ask about your immigration status during a traffic stop?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在加州，哪些執法人員可以在交通攔檢時詢問您的移民身份？
questions.explanation_en: In California, only federal law enforcement officers can ask about your immigration status. State and local officers cannot.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在加州，只有聯邦執法人員可以詢問您的移民身份。州和地方執法人員不可以。
questions.explanation_zh: 在加州，只有联邦执法人员可以询问您的移民身份。州和地方执法人员不可以。

questions.stem_en: If a law enforcement officer asks permission to search your vehicle during a traffic stop, what is your right?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果執法人員在交通攔檢時要求搜查您的車輛，您有什麼權利？

options.text_en: You must always allow the search
You have the right to refuse the search
You must get out of the car first
You must call a lawyer before answering
options.text_zhHant: 您必須在回答前打電話給律師

questions.explanation_en: You have the right to refuse a vehicle search. However, officers may still search if they have probable cause.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 您有權拒絕車輛搜查。但是，如果執法人員有合理懷疑，仍然可以進行搜查。
questions.explanation_zh: 您有权拒绝车辆搜查。但是，如果执法人员有合理怀疑，仍然可以进行搜查。

questions.stem_en: A law enforcement officer who stops you must:
questions.stem_zhHant: 攔停您的執法人員必須：

options.text_en: Show you a warrant before speaking
options.text_zhHant: 在說話前向您出示搜查令

options.text_en: State the reason for the stop
Ask you to step out of the vehicle

options.text_zhHant: 要求您的社會安全號碼

questions.explanation_en: Law enforcement officers must state the reason for a traffic or pedestrian stop.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 執法人員必須說明交通或行人攔停的原因。
questions.explanation_zh: 执法人员必须说明交通或行人拦停的原因。
